# ANALYSIS: Walk-forward OOS/IS ratios for Q3 2025 IS, Q4 2025 OOS

## Results

| Candidate | OOS/IS Ratio | Source |
|---|---|---|
| ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE | 0.667 | Leaderboard rank 4: WF PASS (OOS/IS=0.667, deduped N=32) |
| ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER | 2.916 | Leaderboard notes: OOS/IS ratio=2.916 (IS Sharpe=2.726 vs OOS Sharpe=7.950) |
| V14E_PARAM_SWEEP_26K | 2.07 | Leaderboard rank 12: OOS PASS (ratio=2.07) |
| V14E_BEAR_TIME_OF_DAY_GATE | 1.056 | Leaderboard rank 17: OOS WF PASS: PM exp IS=+$12.02 / OOS=+$12.69, ratio=1.056 |
| MIDDAY_TRENDLINE_GATE | unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest | No WF ratio provided in leaderboard or notes for IS=Q3 2025, OOS=Q4 2025 |

## Notes

- IS = Q3 2025, OOS = Q4 2025 as per task.
- Ratios are OOS/IS (out-of-sample over in-sample).
- For MIDDAY_TRENDLINE_GATE, the leaderboard entry reports real-fills OOS completeness but does not specify a walk-forward OOS/IS ratio for the given windows. A Stage-1 backtest is required to derive this metric.
